description.initial: Rocky terrain opens up around you at the base of the mountains. The peaks vanish into cloud above, and the caves below breathe cold mineral air upward through the stone. Somewhere beneath your feet, the Crystal Caves hum with their ancient light.
description.return: The base of the mountains, where the path to the Crystal Caves begins.
description.atmospheric: The air grows cooler here, carrying the mineral scent of deep earth and the soft humming of crystals.

items.itemMessage: You drink the mountain water. It is ice cold and pure, carrying the faint taste of mineral stone.

interactables.name: Weathered Signpost
interactables.examineText: A wooden sign, barely readable after years of exposure: 'Crystal Caves, Visitors Welcome. The cave entrance lies to the south. Please respect the crystals and their keeper.'
